Welcome to oDoc 👋

A clean, fast document reader and editor. Supports Markdown, HTML, PDF, EPUB, and plain text.

Use the + Add Files button in the sidebar, or drag and drop files anywhere on the window to get started.

Supported formats: .md · .txt · .html · .pdf · .epub

Remove file?
will be removed from oDoc.
